Class ExecutionConstraint

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.ExecutionConstraint
All Implemented Interfaces:
IExecutionConstraint, IExecutionElement
public class ExecutionConstraint extends AbstractExecutionElement implements IExecutionConstraint
The default implementation of IExecutionConstraint.

      public ExecutionConstraint(ITreeSettings settings, Node proofNode, PosInOccurrence modalityPIO, JTerm term)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      settings - The ITreeSettings to use.
      proofNode - The Node of KeY's proof tree which is represented by this IExecutionNode.
      term - The JTerm representing the constraint.
